headline: 3 Reasons LH is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Since October 2025, Labcorp has been in a holding pattern, posting a small loss of 1.9% while floating around $272.50. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 3.5% gain during that period.
